{{Missing Info}}

= Snowy Day =
[[File:Snowy Day Poster.png|200px|left|alt=Snowy Day]]
Dec. 22 2023 - Jan. 05 2024

'''Official News Announcement:''' https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=45
{{Clear}}

= Relic Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|1st Winter Olympics Badge|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Resort Postcard|green}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Snow House Model|green}}

= Home Decoration Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Brave Merman|black|Home Decoration}} (Home Decoration)

[[Category:Events]]
